title: Vedantu is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Vedantu is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Vedantu in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!
